human_actions_pending.action: Set up Supabase project and add env vars to .env.local
human_actions_pending.context: Auth and deck saving require NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. supabase/schema.sql exists and is ready to run.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy to Vercel and configure environment variables
human_actions_pending.context: Project builds clean. Just needs Vercel project creation and env vars set in dashboard.

decisions.decision: TCGdex image URLs need .webp extension — /high returns HTML, /high.webp returns image/webp
decisions.rationale: Discovered via curl -sI. All image rendering now uses card.image + '/high.webp'

decisions.decision: esubi.css must be imported inside Esubi.tsx ('use client'), not from index.ts barrel
decisions.rationale: CSS import in non-client barrel causes chunk hash instability and ChunkLoadError on navigation
Avoids blocking homepage SSR on external API call; page renders immediately

decisions.decision: searchCards uses URLSearchParams (= separator), not manual string concatenation (: separator)
decisions.rationale: TCGdex v2 API uses standard query params. Colon format returned empty array silently.

decisions.decision: Background texture: 320px fixed size instead of 80% viewport
decisions.rationale: 80% was too large/overpowering; 320px gives tight subtle tiling

next_action: Set up Supabase project, add env vars to .env.local, then implement auth (signup/login pages + session middleware).
context_notes: Codebase is in good shape. Build is clean (0 errors). Repo is live at github.com/Prokaiwa/thecardseeker. All core pages work. The card browser has live search, typeahead, initial load, and working images. Card detail page exists at /cards/[id]. The main gap blocking core value is auth — without it, decks can't be saved. supabase/schema.sql is already written and ready to run.
